content.en:
"Anyway, a duplicate body has escaped!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

Immediately, he found a slightly safer position, and then gathered a few copies of his body again to patrol around to prevent danger.

Then, he began to study the vine of the whiskers.

This teneil vine wasn't big, but it wasn't small either.

He began to study little by little, and after his continuous research, he finally discovered the use of the Devil's Whisker Vine.

The vine of the whisker needs to be crushed, and then the essence of it needs to be absorbed with the spirit will, so that you can comprehend the ultimate rules faster.

This piece of the vine of the demon whisker was enough for Ye Tian to use for a long time.

Subsequently, he began to use the Vine of the Whiskers to comprehend the Ultimate Rules of the Abyssal Star.

He shared the enlightenment with the replica body on the side of the main body of the Yuanxing, using the vine of the demon whisker here, and the effect was similar to that of the other side.

With the use of the Demon Whisker Vine, Ye Tianshen comprehended the effect of the Yuan Star's ultimate rules many times better, and comprehended many mysteries one by one.

But he also found a problem, that is, the copy body that used the Devil's Whisker Vine seemed to have a little problem with its mental will, as if it was affected by the power of the Devil's Whisker Vine.

If 10 had been used, the replica body might have become a puppet of the Whisker Vine, if not a puppet.

But Ye Tian's copy body does not affect each other, and when the time comes, sacrifice this copy body to get rid of the influence.

That Demon Whisker Vine had not reached the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, and it could not affect all of Ye Tian's copy body, so there was no need to worry.

So, he was relieved to use the vine of the whiskers.

After the Demon Whisker Vine had been used for a period of time, Ye Tian's Abystalt Star Ultimate Rule had finally broken through again and reached the Double Realm.

And he continued to use the Devil's Whisker Vine to comprehend the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule, which was stronger than the Ultimate Rule of the Dimensional Sea, and the progress of the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule brought more strength improvement.

Therefore, he mainly comprehended the ultimate rules of the Yuanxing.

When this section of the Demon Whisker Vine was completely exhausted, Ye Tian's Abyss Star Ultimate Rule had finally reached the triple realm.

The Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule Realm has improved, and the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body has naturally improved.

Now, Ye Tian's strength is much stronger than in the past, but he is still not the opponent of the Demon Whisker Vine.

But he wanted the Whisker Vine so much, and that's a good thing!

......

Outside the Isle of Whiskers.

Ye Tian's duplicate bodies came here one by one, and he was ready to enter the Demon Whisker Island again.

He wanted to use the same method to kill an ultimate creature first, then copy the body of the ultimate creature, and then approach the vine of the Whisker and attack the vine again.

With his current strength, it would be easy to slay the ultimate creatures on the Isle of Demons.

Soon.

Ye Tian set his sights on an ultimate creature called Infant Throat, several replicating bodies directly attacked and killed each other, killing it in an instant, and then replacing its identity with its replica body.

Immediately afterwards, the baby's throat copy body hid several of Ye Tian's copy bodies in his body, and he did not rush to get close to the vine of the demon beard, but waited for some years.

this day.

Ye Tian approached the Devil's Whisker Vine at this time, but before he could really get close to the Devil's Whisker Vine, the Devil's Whisker Vine moved.

Seeing this, he knew that the vine of the demon whisker was on guard, and it was impossible to attack and kill like last time.

"Just do it!"

Ye Tian's copied body all appeared, and he directly killed the vine of the Demon Whisker.

This time, his strength is much stronger than in the past, even if he can't defeat the vine of the whiskers, but with multiple copy bodies, it is not without hope of cutting off a piece of the vine of the whiskers.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian and the Demon Whisker Vine Dian were killed.

Thundered!!!!

The battle began, and the Demon Whisker Vine showed extremely terrifying combat power, but Ye Tian also burned the Origin Killing just to cut off a section of the Demon Whisker Vine.

Ignoring his own defenses, he continued to attack one position on the Whisker Vine.

Under the bombardment of one ultimate dimension killing move, a small section of the vine of the Demon Whisker Vine was cut off, but Ye Tian also sacrificed a replica body.

Followed by.

Ye Tian took away this piece of vine and quickly escaped, and the other copies of the body of the palace.

At this time, there are ultimate creatures to intercept Ye Tian, but Ye Tian's strength is much stronger than in the past, and it is not easy for them to intercept.

In the midst of a slaughtering battle, Ye Tian escaped from the Island of Devil's Whiskers, and then quickly left and disappeared.

......

"This section of the vine of the Demon Whisker is not small, there should be hope that I will comprehend the Extreme Rules of the Abyss Star to the Quadruple Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to use this vine of demonic whiskers to begin to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Abyssal Star.

Time flies, and another long time has passed.

this day.

This section of the vine of the Demon Whisker was about to be exhausted, and Ye Tian finally succeeded in comprehending the Ultimate Rule of the Abyss to the Quadruple Realm before the vine of the Demon Whisker was exhausted.

The Quadruple Realm's Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule was much stronger than the Triple Realm's Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule, which also made Ye Tian's strength skyrocket.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian attacked the Demon Whisker Vine every once in a while, which made the Demon Whisker Vine extremely angry, but as his strength became stronger and stronger, the Demon Whisker Vine gradually couldn't help him.

Hundreds of millions of years later.

Ye Tian's Yuanxing Ultimate Rule had reached the fivefold realm, and his combat power had far surpassed that of when he had just entered the Tianqu Forbidden Zone. 573......

Ye Tian came to the Devil's Whisker Island again and found that the Devil's Whisker Vine had disappeared and was no longer in place.

And the traces were also erased by the vine of the demon whiskers, making it difficult for Ye Tian to find its traces.

"Seeing that my strength is getting stronger and stronger, the vine of the demon whisker is cowardly, and he runs away!"

Ye Tian was very helpless.

The Vine of the Whisker was indeed mobile, but its movement speed was very slow, which caused Ye Tian to ignore the fact that it would run away.

As a result, it really ran away.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian kept attacking here, tearing apart the earth here.

He suspected that the vine was still hiding deep underground on the island of the whiskers.

But the ground of the Island of Demon's Whiskers is very tough, and the substances here are not ordinary substances, even if Ye Tian attacks wildly, he can only tear the ground of the Island of Demon's Whiskers a little bit.

After a long time, he pierced the Whisker Island very deeply, and still did not find the Whisker Vine.

The copy talent also kept looking for traces of the vine of the Devil's Whiskers, but there were no clues.

In the end, Ye Tian had to admit that the vine of the Demon Whisker had run out of the Island of the Demon Whisker, and he didn't know where it had gone.

So, Ye Tian began to collect the resources of the Devil's Whisker Island, and gave up looking for the Devil's Whisker Vine.
